title: da'ag #1672
definition:
1) to fear, be anxious, be concerned, be afraid, be careful
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be anxious, be concerned
        1a2) to fear, dread
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be anxious, be concerned

    NASB:  to be anxious or concerned, to fear
